label: MDR deep research: early vasopressors in septic shock
report_md:
# Early vasopressor initiation in septic shock

Evidence graded by EBM hierarchy. Three RCTs and twelve retrospective cohorts examine timing of vasopressor initiation relative to fluid resuscitation. Outcome definitions vary: most RCTs use 28-day mortality; several observational studies use in-hospital mortality, which is sensitive to discharge practices. Immortal-time bias recurs where exposure (vasopressor start) is ascertained after cohort entry.

articles.title: Early vasopressors vs usual care in septic shock: a randomized trial
Vasopressor timing in a retrospective ICU cohort

outcomes.label: In-hospital mortality
outcomes.detail: Used by 4 observational studies; affected by discharge practices

biases.label: Immortal-time bias
biases.detail: Exposure ascertained after cohort entry misclassifies early person-time
